introSection: Rex’s Racer is an Intamin launched shuttle roller coaster located at Shanghai Disneyland in Pudong, Shanghai, China. The ride is part of the Toy Story Playland section of the park.
fullText: Rex’s Racer is an Intamin launched shuttle roller coaster located at Shanghai Disneyland in Pudong, Shanghai, China. The ride is part of the Toy Story Playland section of the park.
